    • ErlangC

      public double ErlangC(int k, double rho)
      The probability that an arriving customer is forced to join the queue (i.e. all servers are occupied)
      Parameters:
      k - - the number of servers
      rho - - utilization
      Returns:
      - probability that an arriving customer is forced to join the queue (i.e. all servers are occupied)
